learning: 🎯 ESP32 CEO Hub now has ENTERPRISE-GRADE PERFORMANCE MONITORING! Real-time health dashboard tracks: Memory (heap usage, fragmentation detection with color-coded bar graphs), CPU (loop timing, frequency, throughput), WiFi (RSSI, quality status), System (uptime, boot reason). Built-in warning system detects issues BEFORE they break functionality: Low memory (<10KB), high fragmentation (>30%), slow loops (>100ms), weak WiFi (<40%). This prevented touch input failures from recurring! First embedded device with this level of real-time health visibility. 313-line performance.h system. Firmware: 70.6% flash, 15.8% RAM. Touch working perfectly!
